Compliance.description: SA VAT compliant, POPIA compliant, Intuit global standards; minor SA localization gaps vs Sage/Xero.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Capterra 4.3/5 (global); SA users rate positively on ease/functionality.

Product Value.description: Simple Start R185/mo; Essentials R280/mo; Plus R380/mo. Good value but USD pricing risk.

Innovation.description: AI-powered insights, 750+ integrations, bank feeds, mobile app, payroll integration.

Accessibility & Security.description: 2FA, SSL, SOC 2 compliant, POPIA compliant; no major SA breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Simple Start R185/mo; Essentials R280/mo; Plus R380/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Positive globally; SA users satisfied with ease/functionality; minor support complaints.
